name: dawn
description: DAWN — Digitally Autonomous Workspace Node. A local AI assistant with a living, data-driven 3D brain.
author: DAWN

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n VITE,MAIN,ELECTRON -c blue,magenta,green "vite" "tsc -p tsconfig.main.json -w --preserveWatchOutput" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 dist-electron/main.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.test:agentos: tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test dist-test/tests/agentos.test.js dist-test/tests/agentosRuntime.test.js dist-test/tests/install.test.js dist-test/tests/coding.test.js dist-test/tests/codingEngine.test.js dist-test/tests/codingRun.test.js dist-test/tests/credentialFloor.test.js dist-test/tests/dcd.test.js dist-test/tests/optimizer.test.js dist-test/tests/research.test.js dist-test/tests/bench.test.js dist-test/tests/documents.test.js dist-test/tests/workspace.test.js dist-test/tests/calendar.test.js dist-test/tests/promptSecurity.test.js dist-test/tests/tools.test.js dist-test/tests/security.test.js dist-test/tests/email.test.js dist-test/tests/backup.test.js dist-test/tests/ui.test.js dist-test/tests/contract.test.js dist-test/tests/featureMaturity.test.js dist-test/tests/globalSearch.test.js dist-test/tests/diagnostics.test.js dist-test/tests/workspaceGraph.test.js dist-test/tests/emailSetup.test.js dist-test/tests/workspaceAutoReg.test.js dist-test/tests/routeConsistency.test.js dist-test/tests/workspacePicker.test.js dist-test/tests/modelCookbook.test.js dist-test/tests/knowledgeGuard.test.js dist-test/tests/sourceState.test.js dist-test/tests/citation.test.js dist-test/tests/knowledgeStale.test.js
